name: qa-automation
description: Portable QA automation plugin with a qa-automation skill for creating/updating governed automation scripts and syncing automation status through Notion and Plane.

interface.shortDescription: Create and sync QA automation scripts.
interface.longDescription: QA Automation provides a portable skill for planner contracts, executor automation signals, manual automation requests, Notion and Plane MCP sources, automation_change_set.json governance, Playwright TypeScript fallback, locator policy, validation tiers, review gates, Notion automation status updates, Plane managed comments/descriptions/state sync, bridge sync, and promotion readiness.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-automation to create or update governed automation scripts and sync automation status through Notion or Plane when provided.
